name: Financing Experience Feedback
description: Gauge customer satisfaction with the marine financing process
public_description: We'd love your feedback on the financing portion of your purchase to help us keep the process as smooth as possible.

questions.label: How smooth was the overall financing process?
Were the loan terms and rates clearly explained?
How long did the financing approval process take?
How would you rate the communication from our finance team?
How likely are you to recommend our financing options to others?
Any issues or suggestions regarding the financing process?
